title: Show Netherite
description: Changes the color of netherite by pressing a configurable key (F9 by default) without a resource pack
body:
Show Netherite makes Ancient Debris easier to spot while you mine—without adding new blocks or bulky overlays. Toggle a cyan/teal highlight with a single key (default F9, rebind in controls under Show Netherite), and nearby debris will “pop” out of the Nether darkness.

Why use it
Ancient Debris blends into Netherrack and caves. This mod gives you a clear visual cue so you spend less time rechecking the same tunnels.


Features

Toggle highlight on/off anytime
Stronger visibility in deep dark areas via boosted lighting near highlighted debris (client-side)
Resource-friendly model override with tinting—no fake ore blocks spawned in the world
Works great for solo / servers (visuals are on your client only)
Notes
This is a client-side quality-of-life tool. Respect server rules and fair play expectations.
